known_reviewers.name: Dr Daniel Taylor
patterns: Expects radiation safety for vulnerable populations
Verifies IFU warnings traceable to Risk Analysis
Asks for specific test report page numbers

common_focus_areas: DO-001: Device description completeness (40.6% of findings)
Cross-document consistency between CER and IFU

writing_advice.tone: Evidence-forward. Every claim needs a source reference.
writing_advice.risk_level: High scrutiny on contraindications and patient safety
common_pitfalls: IFU warnings not traceable to Risk Analysis hazard controls

common_focus_areas: DO-001: Device description and model variants
TR-001: Test report completeness and traceability

writing_advice.tone: Thorough and systematic. Every document update must be explicit.
writing_advice.risk_level: Persistent追问 — same DR number across rounds means unresolved issues accumulate
writing_advice.evidence_expectation: Complete test reports with traceable results
common_pitfalls: Incomplete test reports → persistent DR reopening
Sterilization validation gaps → manufacturing review escalation
